title: Bottom row: Z X C V B
description: Left hand bottom — the trickiest reach
text: ax ax ax cab cab cab vex vex vex back back back zap zap zap five five five bake bake bake

tips.text: Bottom row = DOWN from home — most awkward stretch

tips.target: ax ax ax cab cab cab vex vex vex back

tips.text: Z and X are rare — but you still need them

tips.target: back back zap zap zap five five five bake bake bake

character_tips.anna: Bottom row is hardest. Curl your fingers UNDER your palms to reach.
character_tips.maxim: Master the bottom row = master 95% of typing struggles.
character_tips.knopych: BOTTOM ROW BOSS! ⬇️ Curl those fingers!
character_tips.klavochka: Reaching low like picking flowers, my dear 🌻
